import { operate } from '../util/lift'; import { createOperatorSubscriber } from './OperatorSubscriber'; export function takeWhile(predicate, inclusive = false) { return operate((source, subscriber) => { let index = 0; source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, (value) => { const result = predicate(value, index++); (result || inclusive) && subscriber.next(value); !result && subscriber.complete(); })); }); } //# sourceMappingURL=takeWhile.js.map
